keyword.trend_momentum: accelerating — LangChain 2026 State of AI Agents: 57% of orgs in production, 32% cite quality as top barrier. MLflow 30M+ monthly downloads. Evaluation tooling ecosystem exploded Q1 2026 (Maxim, DeepEval, Ragas, Arize, LangSmith). First year with telemetry-grade production benchmarks.

selection_rationale.why_this_keyword: AI Agent Evaluation is the logical third chapter in AgentForge's enterprise agent lifecycle series. Run #1 covered orchestration (build). Run #2 covered governance (control). Run #3 covers evaluation (measure and improve). Together they form the complete enterprise AI agent lifecycle: Build → Control → Measure.
timeliness_factors: LangChain 2026 State of AI Agents report: 57% of organizations have agents in production, 32% cite quality as #1 barrier
MLflow crossed 30M+ monthly downloads — evaluation is the fastest-growing AI engineering category
Multiple evaluation platforms launched or matured in Q1 2026: Maxim AI, DeepEval 2.0, Ragas, Arize Phoenix, LangSmith
2026 is the first year with telemetry-grade benchmarks (McKinsey, Gartner, Forrester, Bain) — before this, all ROI claims were self-reported
McKinsey 2026: 6.4 median hours saved/week, 41% year-one ROI, but 19% of programs never reach payback — evaluation is the dividing line
Forrester: 25% of enterprise AI spend deferred due to quality/governance concerns
Complementary to prior runs: orchestration (May 23), governance (May 25), evaluation (today) — complete lifecycle
selection_rationale.domain_alignment: Strong — AgentForge's core domain is AI agents and enterprise automation. Evaluation is the operational reality layer that makes orchestration and governance measurable. This article positions AgentForge as covering the full lifecycle.
selection_rationale.differentiation_from_prior_runs: Run #1 (May 23): AI Agent Orchestration — how to build multi-agent systems. Run #2 (May 25): Agentic AI Governance — how to control autonomous agents safely. Run #3 (today): AI Agent Evaluation — how to measure, test, and improve agent quality in production. No overlap — complementary lifecycle stages.
